tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Need To / Needed To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Need To / Needed To का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I need to finish this work. I needed to finish this work. He needs to see a doctor. He needed to see a doctor. We need to drink more water.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Need To / Needed To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Need To / Needed To का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We needed to drink more water. I need to make this decision. I needed to make this decision. She needs to take rest. She needed to take rest.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "क्या तुम्हें यह करना है?"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Do you need to do this?

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "He needed to see a doctor yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He needed to see a doctor.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Need To / Needed To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Need To / Needed To का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We need to get more information. We needed to get more information. I need to do this quickly. I needed to do this quickly.
